problem id: 4195699e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  10000001 -> 00000000
  01000100 -> 00000000
  01010011 -> 00100000
  11111110 -> 11000000
  11110001 -> 00000000
  01001000 -> 00000000
  11000010 -> 00000000
  01001101 -> 10000000
  10111001 -> 00000000
  00010111 -> 01100000

query: 11000111
predicted answer: 01100000
